description_long: This is a colorful bucket hat with a wide, downward-sloping brim and a rounded crown. The exterior fabric features a vibrant, abstract tie-dye pattern in shades of pink, red, and white, giving it a playful and casual appearance. The brim is soft and flexible, providing shade and sun protection around the entire circumference. The crown is low and rounded, typical of bucket hats, and appears to be made from a lightweight, breathable textile. There are no visible decorative elements such as ribbons, patches, or embroidery. The hat is displayed on a neutral mannequin head, emphasizing its shape and fit.
description: A vibrant tie-dye bucket hat with a wide, soft brim and a rounded crown, featuring pink, red, and white colors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the downward-sloping brim and the rounded crown, with the tie-dye pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical brim and the full display of the colorful pattern across the front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the brim's curve and the continuous tie-dye design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and the even width of the brim all around.
attribute_brim_style: wide and downward-sloping, soft and flexible
